violations.text: There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. Resource given to PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Resource given to PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

The dead rodent observed on glue trap. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies.PIC roved from premise. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026
Dumpster area observed with an accumulation of trash, litter, and/or other debris. Refuse areas must be kept clean as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2026

Inspector observed a dead mouse on trap. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies.PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025

The floors under kick plates in retail have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and/or rodent droppings &urine. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Cleaning initiated during inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025
Inspector observed various food product with rodent gnaw marks, droppings, and/or urine. PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. See disposal list. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2025

The presence of (rodents ) is not controlled as evidenced by (gnawed food product, urine, and droppings, and nesting material ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the (food storage shelves in the retail and back storage area ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food, rodent droppings and urine. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2025

The floors throughout the establishment have an accumulation of soil residue food debris, rodent droppings and urine. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the dairy cooler shelves and retail shelves have an accumulation of food and soil residue. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment, trash, and other debris were observed in the outside refuse area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2024
